case_title: HOPKINS, HENRY vs. HURON, JIM et al

docket_entries.description: 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOPKINS, HENRY AS TO DEFENDANT HURON, JIM JOUSA, DUSTIN REIN, TIMOTHY LINZ, ELMAR DOES 1 TO 10
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOPKINS, HENRY COURT TRIAL SET FOR JUL-25-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 05 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOPKINS, HENRY AS TO DEFENDANT HURON, JIM JOUSA, DUSTIN REIN, TIMOTHY LINZ, ELMAR DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY DEFENDANT HURON, JIM REIN, TIMOTHY LINZ, ELMAR HEARING SET FOR JUN-06-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 06

#5 BENSON/HOLMES: C/C FOR TRIAL W/O JURY. ATT R MADDEN FOR PLTF. DEFT JAMES HURON IN PRO PER. DEFTS TIMOTHY RYAN & ELMAR LINS ANSWERED BUT NOT PRESENT. DEFT DUSTIN JOUSA DID NOT ANSWER & NOT PRESENT. STIP JDMT AS TO DEFT HURON. COURT TRIAL AS TO DEFTS RYAN & LINS. ORAL & WRITTEN TESTIMONY. JDMT FOR PLTF AGAINST DEFTS RYAN & LINS. PLTF TO ENTER DEFAULT OR DISMISSAL AS TO DEFT JOUSA. PLTF TO PREPARE JDMT.
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT HURON, JIM

ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT REIN, TIMOTHY
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 06, DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, CALENDAR OF JUN-06-1994, SUSTAINED 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND FOR REASONS IN DEMURRER CCP430.10(E) & (F)
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT JOUSA, DUSTIN
APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS FILED BY DEFENDANT REIN, TIMOTHY

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HURON, JIM REIN, TIMOTHY LINZ, ELMAR JDMT BY COURT AS TO ELMAR LINS & TIMOTHY A RYAN & BY STIP AS TO JAMES HURON AS FOLLOWS: COURT ORDERS JDMT AGAINST ELMAR LINS, TIMOTHY A RYAN & JAMES HURON FOR RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 3960 18TH STREET & FORFEITURE OF LEASE. COURT ORDERS JDMT AGAINST ELMAR LINS & TIMOTHY A RYAN ONLY FOR $3990 BACK RENT, $2204.70 DAMAGES (AFTER $975 SECURITY DEPOSIT DEDUCTED), $850 ATTY FEES, $180 COSTS. COURT ORDERS JDMT AGAINST JAMES HURON ONLY FOR $11,970 (BACK RENT TRIPLED), $6614.10 (DAMAGES TRIPLED), $180 COSTS. ISSUANCE OF WRIT IS STAYED TO 5:00PM 8-1-94. IF JAMES HURON VACATES PREMISES BY 5:00PM 8-1-94, PLTF WILL PAY HIM $1800 CASH FOR WHICH HE MUST SIGN RECEIPT, & WILL FILE A DISMISSAL W/ PREJUDICE AS TO HIM. PROPERTY LEFT AFTER THAT TIME WILL BE DEEMED ABANDONED. JAMES HURON WILL NOT INTENTIONALLY WASTE THE PROPERTY DURING THE REMAINDER OF HIS STAY. HE WAIVES ANY RIGHT TO APPEAL. HE & PLTF WAIVE ALL OTHER CLAIMS. SEE JDMT AT LENGTH FOR FURTHER DETAILS.
PHOTOCOPY FOR 3 COPY FOR CASE NUMBER 104453. DEFT COPY. FOR DEFENDANT HURON, JIM
